TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kavalan, story: KavNr-ancestor_ngengi
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: sanupaiku tu zana baqbaqi aimu sunis zau.
S.PHON: sanupaiku tu z~rana βaqβaqi aimu sunis z~rau.
S.FORM: sanupaiku tu zana baqbaqi aimu sunis zau.
S.PHON: sanupaiku tu z~rana βaqβaqi aimu sunis z~rau.
S.TRANSL: 我要跟你們這些小孩說我們祖先的故事.
I am going to tell you, children, a story about our ancestors.

S.FORM: masang baqbaqita na kebalan baqiku zini tagilanan.
S.PHON: masaŋ βaqβaqita na kəβaran βaqiku z~rini tagiranan.
S.FORM: masang baqbaqita na kebalan baqiku zini tagilanan.
S.PHON: masaŋ βaqβaqita na kəβaran βaqiku z~rini tagiranan.
S.TRANSL: 從前我們噶瑪蘭的祖先從宜蘭來.
Long time ago, our Kavalan ancestors came from Yi-lan.

S.FORM: sadamuan qaniau ta tagilanan nani.
S.PHON: saɮamuan qaniau ta tagiranan nani.
S.FORM: sadamuan qaniau ta tagilanan nani.
S.PHON: saɮamuan qaniau ta tagiranan nani.
S.TRANSL: 他們從宜蘭縣過來.

TRANSL.notes: They (came from) the county Yi-lan.

S.TRANSL: They the county Yi-lan.

S.FORM: yauti tagilanan mRaytaRun tu zna qemuway tu zna ya baqbaqian.
S.PHON: jauti tagiranan mʁajtaʁun tu z~rna qəmuwaj tu z~rna ja βaqβaqian.
S.FORM: yauti tagilanan mRaytaRun tu zna qemuway tu zna ya baqbaqian.
S.PHON: jauti tagiranan mʁajtaʁun tu z~rna qəmuwaj tu z~rna ja βaqβaqian.
S.TRANSL: 在宜蘭祖先開墾水田, 耕種水田.
'In Yi-lan ancestors cultivated fields of rice and planted rice.

S.FORM: Runanay matiw Ribawut semalaw tu tu sapaqanan tu su tu sunisna baqbaqina mniz.
S.PHON: ʁunanaj matiw ʁiβawut səmaraw tu tu sapaqanan tu su tu sunisna βaqβaqina mniz~r.
S.FORM: Runanay matiw Ribawut semalaw tu tu sapaqanan tu su tu sunisna baqbaqina mniz.
S.PHON: ʁunanaj matiw ʁiβawut səmaraw tu tu sapaqanan tu su tu sunisna βaqβaqina mniz~r.
S.TRANSL: 男人去捕魚打獵好讓老人小孩都有東西吃.
Men went fishing and hunting for food for all children and elders.

S.FORM: nayaw waway na kebalan tagilanan.
S.PHON: najaw wawaj na kəβaran tagiranan.
S.FORM: nayaw waway na kebalan tagilanan.
S.PHON: najaw wawaj na kəβaran tagiranan.
S.TRANSL: 這就是噶瑪蘭人在宜蘭的生活方式.
And this is Kavalans' way of life in Yi-lan.

S.FORM: tu masang mai tu lazan ta takalinku tangi nani suhuakonglu zinna nanganna lazan 'nay masang.
S.PHON: tu masaŋ mai tu raz~ran ta takarinku taŋi nani suhuak*ŋru z~rinna naŋanna raz~ran ʔnaj masaŋ.
S.FORM: tu masang mai tu lazan ta takalinku tangi nani suhuakonglu zinna nanganna lazan 'nay masang.
S.PHON: tu masaŋ mai tu raz~ran ta takarinku taŋi nani suhuak*ŋru z~rinna naŋanna raz~ran ʔnaj masaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 從前花蓮都沒有路, 現在他們說蘇花公路, 就是那條路的名字.
And in the past, there were no roads in Hualien, and now they say Su-hua Road, the name of that road.

S.FORM: baq baqbaqi na kebalan baqbaqita ya semangi tu lazan sa sa kalinku.
S.PHON: βaq βaqβaqi na kəβaran βaqβaqita ja səmaŋi tu raz~ran sa sa karinku.
S.FORM: baq baqbaqi na kebalan baqbaqita ya semangi tu lazan sa sa kalinku.
S.PHON: βaq βaqβaqi na kəβaran βaqβaqita ja səmaŋi tu raz~ran sa sa karinku.
S.TRANSL: 噶瑪蘭的祖先開拓通往花蓮的道路.
Our Kavalan ancestors broadened the road to Hualien.

S.FORM: nayau satuRin qenasianemanna baqbaqi na kebalan zaka.
S.PHON: najau satuʁin qənasianəmanna βaqβaqi na kəβaran z~raka.
S.FORM: nayau satuRin qenasianemanna baqbaqi na kebalan zaka.
S.PHON: najau satuʁin qənasianəmanna βaqβaqi na kəβaran z~raka.
S.TRANSL: 人們覺得噶瑪蘭的祖先很勇敢.
So they considered Kavalan ancestors brave.

S.FORM: tu nayau Rupunpati sayza nani yauti lazan sa hualien.
S.PHON: tu najau ʁupunpati sajz~ra nani jauti raz~ran sa huariən.
S.FORM: tu nayau Rupunpati sayza nani yauti lazan sa hualien.
S.PHON: tu najau ʁupunpati sajz~ra nani jauti raz~ran sa huariən.
S.TRANSL: 可能快要完工了, 然後就有了到花蓮的路.

TRANSL.notes: Perhaps, (the road) was going to be finished, and then there was a road to Hualien.

S.TRANSL: Perhaps, was going to be finished, and then there was a road to Hualien.

S.FORM: masang yau tagilanan ya ya damu na baqian baibai baibaita.
S.PHON: masaŋ jau tagiranan ja ja ɮamu na βaqian βaiβai βaiβaita.
S.FORM: masang yau tagilanan ya ya damu na baqian baibai baibaita.
S.PHON: masaŋ jau tagiranan ja ja ɮamu na βaqian βaiβai βaiβaita.
S.TRANSL: 從前我們祖先的村莊是在宜蘭.
In the past, our ancestors' village was in Yilan.

S.FORM: nani tu buRauti pasa kalinku pasa e mataling sa pateRungan ya ya baqbaqiku.
S.PHON: nani tu βuʁauti pasa karinku pasa ə matariŋ sa patəʁuŋan ja ja βaqβaqiku.
S.FORM: nani tu buRauti pasa kalinku pasa e mataling sa pateRungan ya ya baqbaqiku.
S.PHON: nani tu βuʁauti pasa karinku pasa ə matariŋ sa patəʁuŋan ja ja βaqβaqiku.
S.TRANSL: 我的祖先搬往花蓮,然後又換到新社.
My ancestors moved towards Hualien, and then changed to Xin-she.

S.FORM: baqbaqita mniz Raw tu yauti tapateRungan RaytaRun tu zna sayza.
S.PHON: βaqβaqita mniz~r ʁaw tu jauti tapatəʁuŋan ʁajtaʁun tu z~rna sajz~ra.
S.FORM: baqbaqita mniz Raw tu yauti tapateRungan RaytaRun tu zna sayza.
S.PHON: βaqβaqita mniz~r ʁaw tu jauti tapatəʁuŋan ʁajtaʁun tu z~rna sajz~ra.
S.TRANSL: 也許我們的祖先們都在新社開墾水田.
Perhaps our ancestors all develped fields of rice in Xinshe.

S.FORM: qemuway tu zna tapateRungan ya baqbaqita masang nani.
S.PHON: qəmuwaj tu z~rna tapatəʁuŋan ja βaqβaqita masaŋ nani.
S.FORM: qemuway tu zna tapateRungan ya baqbaqita masang nani.
S.PHON: qəmuwaj tu z~rna tapatəʁuŋan ja βaqβaqita masaŋ nani.
S.TRANSL: 從前我們的祖先在新社耕種水田.
In the past, our ancestors cultivated fields of rice in Xinshe.

S.FORM: Ribawut matiw smalau ya baqbaqi masang.
S.PHON: ʁiβawut matiw smarau ja βaqβaqi masaŋ.
S.FORM: Ribawut matiw smalau ya baqbaqi masang.
S.PHON: ʁiβawut matiw smarau ja βaqβaqi masaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 從前祖先們去捕魚打獵.

TRANSL.notes: In the past, (our) ancestors went fishing and hunting.

S.TRANSL: In the past, ancestors went fishing and hunting.

S.FORM: nayau qenalaluna na baqbaqita masang.
S.PHON: najau qənararuna na βaqβaqita masaŋ.
S.FORM: nayau qenalaluna na baqbaqita masang.
S.PHON: najau qənararuna na βaqβaqita masaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 我們從前的祖先是非常能幹的.
Our ancestors were very competent in the past.

S.FORM: ta tapateRungan ya saquduanna tu sunis 'nay sayza nani.
S.PHON: ta tapatəʁuŋan ja saquɮuanna tu sunis ʔnaj sajz~ra nani.
S.FORM: ta tapateRungan ya saquduanna tu sunis 'nay sayza nani.
S.PHON: ta tapatəʁuŋan ja saquɮuanna tu sunis ʔnaj sajz~ra nani.
S.TRANSL: 也許他們在新社就是這樣養小孩的.

TRANSL.notes: Perhaps (it was how) they nurtured (their) children in Xinshe.

S.TRANSL: Perhaps they nurtured children in Xinshe.

S.FORM: yauti ta ta si tapateRungan nazaw u lisin na saiza na na izau na baibaibudan.
S.PHON: jauti ta ta si tapatəʁuŋan naz~raw u risin na saiz~ra na na iz~rau na βaiβaiβuɮan.
S.FORM: yauti ta ta si tapateRungan nazaw u lisin na saiza na na izau na baibaibudan.
S.PHON: jauti ta ta si tapatəʁuŋan naz~raw u risin na saiz~ra na na iz~rau na βaiβaiβuɮan.
S.TRANSL: 在新社我們的祖先有一些迷信.

TRANSL.notes: There existed in Xinshe some superstitions of (our) ancestors.

S.TRANSL: There existed in Xinshe some superstitions of ancestors.

S.FORM: m dada dalusati tasaw zinna nani.
S.PHON: m ɮaɮa ɮarusati tasaw z~rinna nani.
S.FORM: m dada dalusati tasaw zinna nani.
S.PHON: m ɮaɮa ɮarusati tasaw z~rinna nani.
S.TRANSL: 他們說已經半年了.
They said it's been half a year.

S.FORM: matiwti izau sa salazinpaita zinna sazpu'matiw baqian tu qatiwan Ribawut.
S.PHON: matiwti iz~rau sa saraz~rinpaita z~rinna saz~rpuʔmatiw βaqian tu qatiwan ʁiβawut.
S.FORM: matiwti izau sa salazinpaita zinna sazpu'matiw baqian tu qatiwan Ribawut.
S.PHON: matiwti iz~rau sa saraz~rinpaita z~rinna saz~rpuʔmatiw βaqian tu qatiwan ʁiβawut.
S.TRANSL: 祖先說「我們要去海邊」, 然後就捕魚去了.
Our ancestors said 'We are going to the seashore.' And they went fishing.

S.FORM: temayta tu paRin tu tebaRiay 'nay napas zinta saRa samulayti napas zinna nani.
S.PHON: təmajta tu paʁin tu təβaʁiaj ʔnaj napas z~rinta saʁa samurajti napas z~rinna nani.
S.FORM: temayta tu paRin tu tebaRiay 'nay napas zinta saRa samulayti napas zinna nani.
S.PHON: təmajta tu paʁin tu təβaʁiaj ʔnaj napas z~rinta saʁa samurajti napas z~rinna nani.
S.TRANSL: 他們說「我們看到樹, Napas樹的紅葉,已經開花了」.
They said 'we saw the tree, the red flowers of Napas tree. They've blossomed.'

S.FORM: smangiti tu iza ya ya baqbaqian tu bawat saiza ipaz saiza na babaqian nani.
S.PHON: smaŋiti tu iz~ra ja ja βaqβaqian tu βawat saiz~ra ipaz~r saiz~ra na βaβaqian nani.
S.FORM: smangiti tu iza ya ya baqbaqian tu bawat saiza ipaz saiza na babaqian nani.
S.PHON: smaŋiti tu iz~ra ja ja βaqβaqian tu βawat saiz~ra ipaz~r saiz~ra na βaβaqian nani.
S.TRANSL: 老人們搭竹筏和船.
The elders took raft and boat.

S.FORM: nayauti qibawutanna na pasaqutanna tu sunsunis mniz.
S.PHON: najauti qiβawutanna na pasaqutanna tu sunsunis mniz~r.
S.FORM: nayauti qibawutanna na pasaqutanna tu sunsunis mniz.
S.PHON: najauti qiβawutanna na pasaqutanna tu sunsunis mniz~r.

TRANSL.notes: 那樣(赤桐花開花後),他們去捕魚,叫所有的小孩搬(竹筏&船).

S.TRANSL: 那樣 ,他們去捕魚,叫所有的小孩搬 .

TRANSL.notes: In that way, they caught fish and had all the children move (rafts and boats).

S.TRANSL: In that way, they caught fish and had all the children move .

S.FORM: zuma nani baibudan e u saisipaitati tangi.
S.PHON: z~ruma nani βaiβuɮan ə u saisipaitati taŋi.
S.FORM: zuma nani baibudan e u saisipaitati tangi.
S.PHON: z~ruma nani βaiβuɮan ə u saisipaitati taŋi.
S.TRANSL: 另外,女生老人要釀糯米酒了.
In addition, female elders were going to make wine from glutinous rice.

S.FORM: wa zusapati tasaw zinna baibudan.
S.PHON: wa z~rusapati tasaw z~rinna βaiβuɮan.
S.FORM: wa zusapati tasaw zinna baibudan.
S.PHON: wa z~rusapati tasaw z~rinna βaiβuɮan.
S.TRANSL: 現在要邁入第二年了, 老人這麼說.
'Now, it is going to be the second year', said the female elders.

S.FORM: tu saisiti e sa e mulmuzti tu nuzung saisiti.
S.PHON: tu saisiti ə sa ə murmuz~rti tu nuz~ruŋ saisiti.
S.FORM: tu saisiti e sa e mulmuzti tu nuzung saisiti.
S.PHON: tu saisiti ə sa ə murmuz~rti tu nuz~ruŋ saisiti.

TRANSL.notes: (我們)要釀糯米酒了,(所以)蒸糯米.

S.TRANSL: 要釀糯米酒了, 蒸糯米.

TRANSL.notes: (We) were to make wine from glutinous rice, (so we) steamed glutinous rice.

S.TRANSL: were to make wine from glutinous rice, steamed glutinous rice.

S.FORM: temuzusti ya tasaw qangidtiita paskua zinna nani.
S.PHON: təmuz~rusti ja tasaw qaŋiɮtiita paskua z~rinna nani.
S.FORM: temuzusti ya tasaw qangidtiita paskua zinna nani.
S.PHON: təmuz~rusti ja tasaw qaŋiɮtiita paskua z~rinna nani.
S.TRANSL: 過年了,我們快過年了, 他們說.
New year was coming soon and we were to have New Year, said they.

S.FORM: maqenu saisiti a a tanganannati tu isi baibaibudan masang saiza.
S.PHON: maqənu saisiti a a taŋanannati tu isi βaiβaiβuɮan masaŋ saiz~ra.
S.FORM: maqenu saisiti a a tanganannati tu isi baibaibudan masang saiza.
S.PHON: maqənu saisiti a a taŋanannati tu isi βaiβaiβuɮan masaŋ saiz~ra.

TRANSL.notes: 老人們真的打開了糯米酒(的罐子).

S.TRANSL: 老人們真的打開了糯米酒 .

TRANSL.notes: The female elder really opened (the can of) the wine made from glutinous rice.

S.TRANSL: The female elder really opened the wine made from glutinous rice.

S.FORM: palilinpaita zinna maqenu.
S.PHON: paririnpaita z~rinna maqənu.
S.FORM: palilinpaita zinna maqenu.
S.PHON: paririnpaita z~rinna maqənu.
S.TRANSL: 我們要祭祖,他們說.
'We are going to worship our ancestors,' they said.

S.FORM: mlilinti baibudan masang nani nayau.
S.PHON: mririnti βaiβuɮan masaŋ nani najau.
S.FORM: mlilinti baibudan masang nani nayau.
S.PHON: mririnti βaiβuɮan masaŋ nani najau.
S.TRANSL: 女老人家當時就祭祖,那樣.
Female elders worshipped ancestors at that time.

S.FORM: izaanta na kebalan nayauna paskua aita kebalan ya ya mlilinay ya izau tu zana bab zana baibaibudan masang nayau lalasna nani.
S.PHON: iz~raanta na kəβaran najauna paskua aita kəβaran ja ja mririnaj ja iz~rau tu z~rana βaβ z~rana βaiβaiβuɮan masaŋ najau rarasna nani.
S.FORM: izaanta na kebalan nayauna paskua aita kebalan ya ya mlilinay ya izau tu zana bab zana baibaibudan masang nayau lalasna nani.
S.PHON: iz~raanta na kəβaran najauna paskua aita kəβaran ja ja mririnaj ja iz~rau tu z~rana βaβ z~rana βaiβaiβuɮan masaŋ najau rarasna nani.
S.TRANSL: 那樣的事情是我們婦女過年前做的事情.
These things were what female elder had to do before New Year.

S.FORM: yau a sunis a ingingtiita zinna sayza na na baqbaqi sunsunis nani.
S.PHON: jau a sunis a iŋiŋtiita z~rinna sajz~ra na na βaqβaqi sunsunis nani.
S.FORM: yau a sunis a ingingtiita zinna sayza na na baqbaqi sunsunis nani.
S.PHON: jau a sunis a iŋiŋtiita z~rinna sajz~ra na na βaqβaqi sunsunis nani.
S.TRANSL: 有小孩…我們都有空閒, 老人和小孩說.
There were children. …We had free time, said male elders and children.

S.FORM: u qatiwpaita sa lazin zinna qaqaqaay nani.
S.PHON: u qatiwpaita sa raz~rin z~rinna qaqaqaaj nani.
S.FORM: u qatiwpaita sa lazin zinna qaqaqaay nani.
S.PHON: u qatiwpaita sa raz~rin z~rinna qaqaqaaj nani.
S.TRANSL: 我們要去海邊,比較大的小孩說.
'We will go to the sea,' said the older children.

S.FORM: tu maqenu siaungzus qatiwpaita sa lazin pa pazingpaita zinna tu matiwti masusulun mai paqenanem mai kinausa Raw.
S.PHON: tu maqənu siauŋz~rus qatiwpaita sa raz~rin pa paz~riŋpaita z~rinna tu matiwti masusurun mai paqənanəm mai kinausa ʁaw.
S.FORM: tu maqenu siaungzus qatiwpaita sa lazin pa pazingpaita zinna tu matiwti masusulun mai paqenanem mai kinausa Raw.
S.PHON: tu maqənu siauŋz~rus qatiwpaita sa raz~rin pa paz~riŋpaita z~rinna tu matiwti masusurun mai paqənanəm mai kinausa ʁaw.
S.TRANSL: 一起去,不是單獨一個人,也不是兩個人.
Going together, not alone and not in two.

S.FORM: masusulun kintulu sayza kinsepat saiza kinlima tu wiyati sa lazin.
S.PHON: masusurun kinturu sajz~ra kinsəpat saiz~ra kinrima tu wijati sa raz~rin.
S.FORM: masusulun kintulu sayza kinsepat saiza kinlima tu wiyati sa lazin.
S.PHON: masusurun kinturu sajz~ra kinsəpat saiz~ra kinrima tu wijati sa raz~rin.
S.TRANSL: 三個,四個,五個人一起去海邊.
Going to the sea together in three, four or five.

S.FORM: pazing tu bawut sayza qiqaiR sayza qiqabus sayza ya Runanay matiw sa lazin nani.
S.PHON: paz~riŋ tu βawut sajz~ra qiqaiʁ sajz~ra qiqaβus sajz~ra ja ʁunanaj matiw sa raz~rin nani.
S.FORM: pazing tu bawut sayza qiqaiR sayza qiqabus sayza ya Runanay matiw sa lazin nani.
S.PHON: paz~riŋ tu βawut sajz~ra qiqaiʁ sajz~ra qiqaβus sajz~ra ja ʁunanaj matiw sa raz~rin nani.
S.TRANSL: 男人到海邊射魚,抓九孔和龍蝦.
Men went to the sea to shoot fish, catch holiotis.diversicolor.supertexta and lobsters.

S.FORM: tututi mai mlawung tu nikuayanna.
S.PHON: tututi mai mrawuŋ tu nikuajanna.
S.FORM: tututi mai mlawung tu nikuayanna.
S.PHON: tututi mai mrawuŋ tu nikuajanna.
S.TRANSL: 中午了,他們對於他們所收穫得並不吝嗇.
It's noon and they were not stingy with what they've got.

S.FORM: temaqanna bawutna saiza.
S.PHON: təmaqanna βawutna saiz~ra.
S.FORM: temaqanna bawutna saiza.
S.PHON: təmaqanna βawutna saiz~ra.
S.TRANSL: 他們烤魚.
They grilled their fish.

S.FORM: nayau qabus Ramazanna qaiR Ramazanna.
S.PHON: najau qaβus ʁamaz~ranna qaiʁ ʁamaz~ranna.
S.FORM: nayau qabus Ramazanna qaiR Ramazanna.
S.PHON: najau qaβus ʁamaz~ranna qaiʁ ʁamaz~ranna.
S.TRANSL: 龍蝦,用煮的,九孔,用煮的.
Lobsters, they boiled; holiotis.diversicolor.supertexta, they boiled.

S.FORM: sakaputan Raw mai tu qa simqalawung mniz ya sakaputan ya sa lazin nayau wawai na Runanay.
S.PHON: sakaputan ʁaw mai tu qa simqarawuŋ mniz~r ja sakaputan ja sa raz~rin najau wawai na ʁunanaj.
S.FORM: sakaputan Raw mai tu qa simqalawung mniz ya sakaputan ya sa lazin nayau wawai na Runanay.
S.PHON: sakaputan ʁaw mai tu qa simqarawuŋ mniz~r ja sakaputan ja sa raz~rin najau wawai na ʁunanaj.
S.TRANSL: 一起去的男人不對彼此吝嗇所有的東西.
The men going together were not stingy to each other with all the things.

S.FORM: matiw sa lazin mai mwazas tu tamun.
S.PHON: matiw sa raz~rin mai mwaz~ras tu tamun.
S.FORM: matiw sa lazin mai mwazas tu tamun.
S.PHON: matiw sa raz~rin mai mwaz~ras tu tamun.

TRANSL.notes: (他們)去海邊不帶菜.

S.TRANSL: 去海邊不帶菜.

TRANSL.notes: (They) went to the sea without bring any meals.

S.TRANSL: went to the sea without bring any meals.

S.FORM: wama saiza 'may siri' ya mian ya na na Runanay.
S.PHON: wama saiz~ra ʔmaj siriʔ ja mian ja na na ʁunanaj.
S.FORM: wama saiza 'may siri' ya mian ya na na Runanay.
S.PHON: wama saiz~ra ʔmaj siriʔ ja mian ja na na ʁunanaj.
S.TRANSL: 只有飯,辣椒和鹽.
only rice, pepper, and salt.

S.FORM: aimi tazungan nani a qatiwpaita sianguzus tina tina zinna tinaku masang nani maqenu.
S.PHON: aimi taz~ruŋan nani a qatiwpaita siaŋuz~rus tina tina z~rinna tinaku masaŋ nani maqənu.
S.FORM: aimi tazungan nani a qatiwpaita sianguzus tina tina zinna tinaku masang nani maqenu.
S.PHON: aimi taz~ruŋan nani a qatiwpaita siaŋuz~rus tina tina z~rinna tinaku masaŋ nani maqənu.
S.TRANSL: 我們女生去撿海菜/貝類,我媽媽從前說.
We females went to pick food at the seaside, my mother said in the past.

S.FORM: aiya sianguzuspaita Raw zinku tu temabutiiku tu 'may mian siri'.
S.PHON: aija siaŋuz~ruspaita ʁaw z~rinku tu təmaβutiiku tu ʔmaj mian siriʔ.
S.FORM: aiya sianguzuspaita Raw zinku tu temabutiiku tu 'may mian siri'.
S.PHON: aija siaŋuz~ruspaita ʁaw z~rinku tu təmaβutiiku tu ʔmaj mian siriʔ.
S.TRANSL: 就準備飯鹽和辣椒.
Prepare rice, salt and pepper.

W.TRANSL: 撿海邊的食物=未來=1IPL.主格

S.FORM: niazasku tu matiwtiimi.
S.PHON: niaz~rasku tu matiwtiimi.
S.FORM: niazasku tu matiwtiimi.
S.PHON: niaz~rasku tu matiwtiimi.
S.TRANSL: 這是我們帶去的東西.

TRANSL.notes: These are the things we took to go (there).

S.TRANSL: These are the things we took to go .

S.FORM: masuluniku tu tinaku.
S.PHON: masuruniku tu tinaku.
S.FORM: masuluniku tu tinaku.
S.PHON: masuruniku tu tinaku.

TRANSL.notes: 我跟媽媽一起(去).

S.TRANSL: 我跟媽媽一起 .

TRANSL.notes: I (went) with my mother.

S.TRANSL: I with my mother.

S.FORM: qialaimi tu pais.
S.PHON: qiaraimi tu pais.
S.FORM: qialaimi tu pais.
S.PHON: qiaraimi tu pais.
S.TRANSL: 我們撿海貝.
We picked up shells.

S.FORM: qialaimi tu tuqu.
S.PHON: qiaraimi tu tuqu.
S.FORM: qialaimi tu tuqu.
S.PHON: qiaraimi tu tuqu.
S.TRANSL: 我們撿海螺.
We picked up conches.

S.FORM: qialaimi tu buqut.
S.PHON: qiaraimi tu βuqut.
S.FORM: qialaimi tu buqut.
S.PHON: qiaraimi tu βuqut.
S.TRANSL: 我們撿海貝.
We picked up shells.

S.FORM: qialaimi tu Rumung.
S.PHON: qiaraimi tu ʁumuŋ.
S.FORM: qialaimi tu Rumung.
S.PHON: qiaraimi tu ʁumuŋ.
S.TRANSL: 我們撿海參.
We picked up sea cucumbers.

S.FORM: malaimi tu tu kapin qatutung niqaalaniq.
S.PHON: maraimi tu tu kapin qatutuŋ niqaaraniq.
S.FORM: malaimi tu tu kapin qatutung niqaalaniq.
S.PHON: maraimi tu tu kapin qatutuŋ niqaaraniq.
S.TRANSL: 我們撿紫菜和海菜類.
We picked up laver and other seaweed.

S.FORM: mwaza nikuayanniq.
S.PHON: mwaz~ra nikuajanniq.
S.FORM: mwaza nikuayanniq.
S.PHON: mwaz~ra nikuajanniq.
S.TRANSL: 我們撿的東西很多.
What we picked up are many in number.

S.FORM: nayau aimi tazungan.
S.PHON: najau aimi taz~ruŋan.
S.FORM: nayau aimi tazungan.
S.PHON: najau aimi taz~ruŋan.
S.TRANSL: 我們女生就那樣.
That's how we females are like.

S.FORM: tu sapatananan.
S.PHON: tu sapatananan.
S.FORM: tu sapatananan.
S.PHON: tu sapatananan.
S.TRANSL: 我們要帶回家的東西.
what we would bring home

S.FORM: manantiimu zinna bai talepawan nani.
S.PHON: manantiimu z~rinna βai tarəpawan nani.
S.FORM: manantiimu zinna bai talepawan nani.
S.PHON: manantiimu z~rinna βai tarəpawan nani.
S.TRANSL: 阿媽說,你們回來了.
'You returned,' said grandmother at home.

S.FORM: oh manantiimi.
S.PHON: *h manantiimi.
S.FORM: oh manantiimi.
S.PHON: *h manantiimi.
S.TRANSL: 我們回來了.
We've come back.

S.FORM: mwaza kenuayannumi.
S.PHON: mwaz~ra kənuajannumi.
S.FORM: mwaza kenuayannumi.
S.PHON: mwaz~ra kənuajannumi.
S.TRANSL: 你們撿的東西多嗎?
Is what you got many in number?

S.FORM: mwaza bai zinniq nayau.
S.PHON: mwaz~ra βai z~rinniq najau.
S.FORM: mwaza bai zinniq nayau.
S.PHON: mwaz~ra βai z~rinniq najau.
S.TRANSL: 我們說,阿媽,很多.
We said, 'a lot, Grandma.'

S.FORM: masang yaupama baibainiq tapawan.
S.PHON: masaŋ jaupama βaiβainiq tapawan.
S.FORM: masang yaupama baibainiq tapawan.
S.PHON: masaŋ jaupama βaiβainiq tapawan.
S.TRANSL: 阿媽還在家的時候.

TRANSL.notes: (When) Grandmother were still at home,

S.TRANSL: Grandmother were still at home,

S.FORM: sazaka aimi na kebalan Raw sanupaiku.
S.PHON: saz~raka aimi na kəβaran ʁaw sanupaiku.
S.FORM: sazaka aimi na kebalan Raw sanupaiku.
S.PHON: saz~raka aimi na kəβaran ʁaw sanupaiku.
S.TRANSL: 我們噶瑪蘭, 我要講說…
We Kavalan. I am going to talk about …

S.FORM: aita buguan sheme yuanzhuming aita nani.
S.PHON: aita βuguan shəmə juanz~rhumiŋ aita nani.
S.FORM: aita buguan sheme yuanzhuming aita nani.
S.PHON: aita βuguan shəmə juanz~rhumiŋ aita nani.
S.TRANSL: 我們,不管什麼原住民,我們.
We…no matter what aborigines…we…

S.FORM: mwaza saiza sheme zu aita Raw a.
S.PHON: mwaz~ra saiz~ra shəmə z~ru aita ʁaw a.
S.FORM: mwaza saiza sheme zu aita Raw a.
S.PHON: mwaz~ra saiz~ra shəmə z~ru aita ʁaw a.
S.TRANSL: 很多族.
Many tribes

S.FORM: wama aita kebalan paskua yau palilin zinna.
S.PHON: wama aita kəβaran paskua jau paririn z~rinna.
S.FORM: wama aita kebalan paskua yau palilin zinna.
S.PHON: wama aita kəβaran paskua jau paririn z~rinna.
S.TRANSL: 只有噶瑪蘭新年有palilin祭祖.
Only we Kavalan have palilin during New Year.

S.FORM: yau pa'tayay yau patuRqan zinta.
S.PHON: jau paʔtajaj jau patuʁqan z~rinta.
S.FORM: yau pa'tayay yau patuRqan zinta.
S.PHON: jau paʔtajaj jau patuʁqan z~rinta.
S.TRANSL: 有我們說的patuRqan招魂.

TRANSL.notes: (We) have what we call patuRqan (conjuring spirits).

S.TRANSL: have what we call patuRqan .

S.FORM: zana 'daqay mai tu patuRqan sayza.
S.PHON: z~rana ʔɮaqaj mai tu patuʁqan sajz~ra.
S.FORM: zana 'daqay mai tu patuRqan sayza.
S.PHON: z~rana ʔɮaqaj mai tu patuʁqan sajz~ra.
S.TRANSL: 別人沒有招魂.

TRANSL.notes: Other (tribes) do not have patuRqan.

S.TRANSL: Other do not have patuRqan.

S.FORM: a aimi kebalan aita na kebalan yau patuRqan paskua palilin Raw nayau.
S.PHON: a aimi kəβaran aita na kəβaran jau patuʁqan paskua paririn ʁaw najau.
S.FORM: a aimi kebalan aita na kebalan yau patuRqan paskua palilin Raw nayau.
S.PHON: a aimi kəβaran aita na kəβaran jau patuʁqan paskua paririn ʁaw najau.
S.TRANSL: 我們噶瑪蘭有招魂patuRqan,過年,祭祖palilin.

TRANSL.notes: We Kavalan has patuRqan (conjuring spirits), New Year, and palilin (worshipping ancestors).

S.TRANSL: We Kavalan has patuRqan , New Year, and palilin .

S.FORM: ya qazuma na na wawayta na kebalan zazaka.
S.PHON: ja qaz~ruma na na wawajta na kəβaran z~raz~raka.
S.FORM: ya qazuma na na wawayta na kebalan zazaka.
S.PHON: ja qaz~ruma na na wawajta na kəβaran z~raz~raka.
S.TRANSL: 我們噶瑪蘭的習俗不同.
We Kavalan's rituals are different.

S.FORM: timaisu sunis nayau ma sasanuanku zaka.
S.PHON: timaisu sunis najau ma sasanuanku z~raka.
S.FORM: timaisu sunis nayau ma sasanuanku zaka.
S.PHON: timaisu sunis najau ma sasanuanku z~raka.
S.TRANSL: 你們小孩,我說的就這樣.
You children, that's all what I wanted to say.
